response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This document contains multiple hallmarks of fabrication: 40 CFR Part 120 does not govern Section 404/WOTUS matters (that is 33 CFR Part 328 and 40 CFR Part 230), the cited Federal Register citation and rule number are unverifiable, and the substantive provisions (waiving Army Corps pre-notice, allowing up to 1 acre of wetland fill with no agency notification) are inconsistent with how Clean Water Act Section 404 exemptions actually operate.
